description:
Massive overhaul of the Mantella mod. More TTS Options, Customizable Multi-Language Support, Use multiple TTS at once, Custom Prompt Formats/Styles, Modular Behavior System and NPC Scripting API, Proper Local LLM integration, Addon System, (basic) SexLab Support (via Addon), Vision Support via LLaVA, and more! Can be buggier than Mantella, it isn't stable and isn't complete, but is more feature rich and has a faster development cycle.

OpenAI API is still supported, but primary focus is on other enabling native support for various other inference engines like llama-cpp-python, transformers, etc.

Supports: Skyrim SE/AE and Skyrim VR
name: Pantella (pre-beta)
